title: Willie
description: Work-in-progress restoration of the 1928 Disney short Steamboat Willie (public domain since 2024) — flat-field, deflicker, denoise on the first minute. Stabilization, dust cleanup, and 4K upscale still open.
license_notes: Steamboat Willie (1928, Walt Disney / Ub Iwerks) — public domain in the US since January 1, 2024. Real-ESRGAN (BSD-3-Clause), RIFE (MIT), FFmpeg (LGPL/GPL).
